abilities.name: Deadly Bloom
abilities.text: Friendly Remains and Underbrush markers within 4" gain the hazardous terrain trait.

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: U Serene Countenance
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model cannot cheat their duel.

actions.name: Desmonia's Edge
actions.effects: An ally within 6" of the target heals 1.

triggers.name: Writhing Roots
triggers.text: Remove a Remains or Underbrush marker within 6". This action deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Pierced by Petals
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has a friendly token, this action deals +1 damage.

actions.name: Desmonia's Thirst
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is engaged by another ally, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Coordinated Attack
triggers.text: Another friendly model may declare a (melee) action targeting the same model.

actions.name: Lacerating Roots
actions.effects: Make a Remains marker within range. Enemy models within (aura)2" of the marker must pass a TN 12 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage. Then, remove the marker.

triggers.name: Choking Pollen
triggers.text: Remove up to one token from enemy models within range of this action's (aura).
